summary: CRITICAL: Missing test_secret_validator.py, fixtures.json, and act-result.txt (required artifact per instructions). Workflow references these missing files and will fail immediately. Actions not pinned to SHA despite comments acknowledging it (lines ~11-12). validate-workflow job is a stub that checks file existence instead of running actionlint. Script quality decent (types, dataclasses, error handling in main) but workflow infrastructure is broken and non-functional. Deliverable cannot execute.
